steps.title: Focus on intention
steps.content: The archaeologists concluded early hominins intentionally chipped rocks to make spheroids. The next sentence says their attempt to make stones as round as possible may show cognitive sophistication, so the blank needs a purpose word.

steps.title: Choose the precise meaning
steps.content: A suggests worry, B suggests similarity, and C suggests compassion; none fits purposeful shaping. The needed idea is that the attempt was intentional and goal-directed. The answer is D.
